meta.title: Falcon Heavy slo-mo launch and landing (Watch the sound ripple through the exhaust at 120 FPS)
meta.description:
Watch SpaceX's Falcon Heavy launch the Arabsat-6A from 10.5 km (6.5 miles) away and landong only 5 km (3 miles) away, taken from the NASA causeway. Shot with a Sony A6500 with a 300mm F2.8 Sigma and some random Sony "dad cam" *shrug* in 120 fps and 60 fps.

Song "Go For Liftoff" off "Maximum Aerodynamic Pressure" by Everyday Astronaut. Available everywhere you listen to music or http://everydayastronaut.com/music for easy links ;)

------------------------------------

Show your support and get tons of behind the scenes video by becoming a Patreon - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

The best place for all your space merch needs!
https://everydayastronaut.com/shop/

I'm the cohost of an awesome podcast where we talk all about current technologies and how they shape our future! http://ourludicrousfuture.com or here on YouTube https://www.youtube.com/ourludicrousfuture
